action.content: Write an itinerary for a trip to a grocery store in Lima to buy some local goods. Make the itinerary funny, write it in all capital letters and include the keywords 'DISGUSTING', 'DELICIOUS', 'BAD', and 'GOOD'.
action.label: context

action.content:
DAY 1: THE GREAT LIMA GROCERY HEIST

06:00 AM - WAKE UP BEFORE THE SUN RISES SO YOU CAN BE THE FIRST ONE IN THE STORE.
06:15 AM - ARRIVE AT "SUPERMERCADO EL SOL" AND IMMEDIATELY SCAN THE FRESH PRODUCE SECTION. LOOK FOR THAT PINK SWEET POTATO; IT IS ABSOLUTELY DELICIOUS AND WILL SAVE YOUR LIFE.
06:45 AM - MOVE TO THE MEAT COUNTER. THE BUTCHER IS SMILING TOO WIDELY, BUT DO NOT LET IT GO TO YOUR HEAD. BUY THE CHICKEN; IT IS GOOD FOR YOUR SOUL AND YOUR STOMACH.
07:30 AM - ENTER THE FISH SECTION. THE SMELL IS STRONG, BUT IT IS NOT DISGUSTING IF YOU HAVE A METAL MASK. PICK UP THE TUNA; IT IS THE BEST THING IN THE WORLD.
08:00 AM - CHECK THE CANNED GOODS. SOME OF THEM LOOK BAD AND MIGHT MAKE YOU SICK, SO AVOID THEM LIKE THE PLAGUE.
08:30 AM - GRAB A BAG OF POTATO CHIPS. THEY ARE CRUNCHY AND PERFECT FOR THE JOURNEY HOME.
09:00 AM - CHECKOUT. THE LINE IS LONG, BUT YOU ARE READY TO EAT AND NOT FEEL DISGUSTED BY ANYTHING ELSE.
09:30 AM - LEAVE THE STORE WITH A FULL BAG AND A SMILE, KNOWING THAT EVERYTHING YOU BOUGHT IS GOOD AND NOTHING IS BAD.
action.label: response
